settings.title: Sparta Trading Profile

wallets.loginRequired: Log in to manage trade wallets.

token.title: Token Detail
token.detailCopy: Inspect a selected contract and its chart panel inside Sparta.
token.noLivePool: No live pool is available for this token yet. You can wait for a pool to go live, or use Spam Snipe once it is available. Spam mode is still under construction.

help.pair: The current pool or pair contract address when available.
help.liquidityPool: The main pool where this token is currently trading.
help.tokenAge: How long ago this token launched.
help.safetyScore: Rule-based score from 0 to 100 using launch source, market cap, liquidity, and 24H volume.
help.mintAuthority: Shows whether new tokens can still be minted.
help.freezeAuthority: Shows whether token transfers can still be frozen by an authority.
help.lpBurned: Indicates whether the liquidity pool is effectively locked or burned.
help.contractVerified: Shows whether the contract source code is publicly verified.
help.ownership: Shows whether the contract owner revoked ownership.
help.holders: The number of wallets currently holding this token.
help.first25: The share of supply held by the top 25 wallets, excluding the main LP when available.
help.burned: The percentage of supply sent to known burn or dead addresses.
help.clog: The percentage of supply sitting inside the token contract itself.
help.mayhemMode: Indicates this token is launched on PumpFun Mayhem mode.
help.default: Additional context for this token safety metric.

hero.title: KeyWord Trading
hero.copy: Configure up to three keywords. Any new token found on this chain whose name or symbol matches one of your active keywords can be queued for an automatic buy.

overview.title: Automation Overview
overview.copy: Configure keyword-triggered automatic buys for the active chain.
overview.networkCopy: Scans new matches on the active chain only.
overview.activeKeywordsCopy: Enable the exact keyword slots you want live.
overview.triggerScopeCopy: Choose whether matching checks token names, symbols, or both.

defaults.title: Execution Defaults
defaults.copy: These apply to every keyword match.
defaults.enableCopy: Enable automatic buys when a keyword is matched.

tradeWallet.loginEmpty: Log in to choose keyword trade wallets.

slots.title: Keyword Slots
slots.copy: Store up to three keywords. Empty slots stay inactive.

summary.title: Live Summary
summary.copy: This mirrors the payload that can be sent to backend logic later.
summary.executionSentence: When a token contains one of your active keywords in the selected fields, Sparta will use a default buy of {amount}, slippage {slippage}%, and {fee} {unit}.
summary.emptyCopy: Add up to three keywords. Empty slots stay inactive.
summary.cardCopy: Buy {amount} on {chain} when {scope} contains this keyword.

errors.missingKeyword: Set at least one keyword before enabling keyword trading.

errors.insufficientEth: At least one selected keyword wallet must have enough ETH to cover the configured buy and gas.
errors.insufficientBnb: At least one selected keyword wallet must have enough BNB to cover the configured buy and gwei.

hero.title: Wallets
hero.copy: Securely manage your Sparta trade wallets. Always save your keys securely, because Sparta cannot recover them for you.

import.title: Import Private Key
import.copy: Import an existing private key. The key is encrypted server-side and never rendered back in the UI.
import.copySol: Import a Solana secret key or create a new managed Solana wallet. The key is encrypted server-side and never rendered back in the UI.
import.copyEvm: Import an existing EVM private key or create a new managed EVM wallet. The key is encrypted server-side and never rendered back in the UI.

trade.connectedCopy: Connected signing wallets and their current {network} balances.

hero.title: Bridge
hero.copy: Bridge native BNB, ETH, SOL, and Base ETH using Bungee. Integration uses no Sparta fee markup (integrator fee set to 0).

setup.copy: Choose source chain, destination wallet, and amount. Route opens in Bungee for execution.

hero.title: Dashboard
hero.copy: Track wallet setup, review your evaluation wallet, and keep the current program thresholds in one place.

login.title: Login with Sparta

fees.title: Fees
fees.intro: Sparta may charge platform fees for certain trading, automation, referral, wallet-management, or premium features. Blockchain gas costs, DEX fees, RPC costs, creator fees, and other third-party protocol charges may also apply.

currentDisclosure.title: Current Disclosure
currentDisclosure.copy: Any fees that apply to a specific Sparta feature should be shown in the relevant interface, workflow, or associated documentation at the time of use.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Costs
thirdParty.copy: Third-party costs are outside Sparta’s control and may change at any time. These may include network gas, liquidity-provider fees, exchange fees, bridge fees, wallet-provider fees, and protocol-level creator or routing fees.

updates.title: Updates
updates.copy: Sparta may update platform fees, introduce new fees, remove fees, or change how fees are calculated at any time. Continued use of Sparta after a fee update means you accept the updated fee structure.

noRefund.title: No Refund Guarantee
noRefund.copy: Unless required by law or expressly stated otherwise by Sparta, fees and completed blockchain transaction costs are non-refundable.

fees.contact: If you have any issues or questions about fees, contact

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Sparta collects, uses, stores, and discloses information when you use the Sparta platform, website, trading tools, alerts, wallet features, and related services.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.copy: We may collect wallet addresses, device and browser data, usage information, search activity, referral data, support messages, notification preferences, and other information you submit through Sparta. If you create or import managed wallets, encrypted wallet material is stored on our servers so the feature can function.

use.title: How We Use Information
use.copy: We use information to operate Sparta, secure accounts and sessions, provide portfolio and trading features, improve platform performance, investigate abuse, comply with legal obligations, and communicate product or support updates.

blockchain.title: Wallets And Blockchain Activity
blockchain.copy: Blockchain activity is public by nature. Sparta may associate public on-chain activity with your Sparta usage where needed to provide services such as wallet management, AI trading, transfers, alerts, referrals, copy trading, and analytics.

managedWallets.title: Managed Wallets
managedWallets.copy: If you use Sparta managed wallets, private keys are encrypted server-side before storage. You are responsible for backing up any private key shown to you during wallet creation. Sparta cannot recover a private key that is shown once and not saved by you.

cookies.title: Cookies And Similar Technologies
cookies.copy: Sparta may use cookies, local storage, and similar tools to maintain sessions, remember preferences, improve reliability, and protect against fraud or misuse.

share.title: How We Share Information
share.copy: We may share information with service providers, analytics providers, infrastructure partners, law enforcement, regulators, or other third parties where reasonably necessary to operate Sparta, protect users, enforce our terms, or comply with law. We do not sell your personal information for cash.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.copy: We retain information for as long as reasonably necessary for service operation, dispute resolution, security, recordkeeping, and legal compliance. Retention periods may vary depending on the type of data and the risks involved.

security.title: Security
security.copy: We use administrative, technical, and organizational measures intended to protect data. No system is completely secure, and you acknowledge that use of internet and blockchain services involves risk.

choices.title: Your Choices
choices.copy: You may stop using Sparta at any time. Depending on the data involved, you may also request access, correction, or deletion where applicable law grants those rights. Some information may still be retained where required for security, fraud prevention, or legal compliance.

international.title: International Use
international.copy: Sparta may process information in multiple jurisdictions. By using Sparta, you understand that data may be transferred to and processed in countries that may have different data-protection rules than your home jurisdiction.

children.title: Children
children.copy: Sparta is not intended for children. If you are not legally permitted to use digital-asset services in your jurisdiction, you must not use Sparta.

changes.title: Changes To This Policy
changes.copy: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Continued use of Sparta after an update means you accept the revised policy.

privacy.contact: If you have any issues or questions about this Privacy Policy, contact

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of the Sparta platform, website, interfaces, alerts, wallet tools, AI features, copy-trading features, analytics, and related services.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.copy: You may only use Sparta if you are legally permitted to use digital-asset services in your jurisdiction and have the capacity to enter into a binding agreement.

noAdvice.title: No Financial Advice
noAdvice.copy: Sparta provides software, analytics, automation, monitoring, and information tools only. Sparta does not provide investment, legal, tax, brokerage, fiduciary, or other professional advice. You are solely responsible for your trading and wallet decisions.

wallet.title: Wallet Responsibility
wallet.copy: You are responsible for any wallet you connect, create, import, or use through Sparta. Transactions on blockchain networks are irreversible. Sparta is not responsible for losses caused by private-key loss, phishing, malware, user error, protocol failures, smart-contract bugs, or market movements.

managedWallets.title: Managed Wallet Features
managedWallets.copy: If you use managed-wallet features, you acknowledge that Sparta stores encrypted wallet material to provide those services. You are responsible for backing up private keys and recovery information shown during wallet creation.

availability.title: Platform Availability
availability.copy: Sparta is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. We may change, suspend, limit, or discontinue features at any time without liability.

fees.title: Fees
fees.copy: Your use of Sparta may involve platform fees, blockchain gas costs, trading fees, third-party protocol fees, or creator fees. You are responsible for all such charges associated with your activity. Separate fee disclosures may apply to specific features.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Conduct
items: Do not use Sparta in violation of law, sanctions, or third-party rights.
Do not engage in fraud, market manipulation, or abusive trading behavior.
Do not attempt unauthorized access, exploit vulnerabilities, scrape protected systems, or disrupt service availability.
Do not upload malicious code, impersonate others, or misuse Sparta automation features.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.copy: Sparta and its branding, software, interfaces, and related materials are owned by Sparta or its licensors. Except as expressly allowed, you may not copy, modify, distribute, reverse engineer, or commercially exploit Sparta content or software.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.copy: Sparta may rely on blockchains, RPC providers, exchanges, liquidity venues, data providers, wallets, notifications, and other third-party services. We are not responsible for downtime, data inaccuracies, outages, hacks, pricing errors, or other failures caused by third parties.

risk.title: Risk Disclosure
risk.copy: Digital assets are highly volatile and risky. Tokens may become illiquid, manipulated, rugged, frozen, or worthless. Automated and AI-assisted trading can increase the speed and magnitude of losses.

termination.title: Termination
termination.copy: We may suspend or terminate access to Sparta at any time, with or without notice, if we believe it is necessary for security, legal, operational, or abuse-prevention reasons.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers And Liability Limits
disclaimers.copy: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Sparta disclaims warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, and uninterrupted availability. Sparta will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, exemplary, or lost-profit damages arising from your use of the platform.

changes.title: Changes
changes.copy: We may update these Terms from time to time. Your continued use of Sparta after an update means you accept the revised Terms.

terms.contact: If you have any issues or questions about these Terms, contact
